name: daily-briefing-cowork
description: Daily briefing as a Claude Code session — synthesis runs in the agent's own context (billed under Claude.ai subscription), I/O is delegated to thin Python helpers that reuse daily_briefing.py's existing functions.
author: james@aiaccessinitiative.org

skills.name: daily-briefing
skills.description: Autonomous daily briefing run. Pulls inputs, synthesizes all sections in-context, renders the dashboard, sends email + Slack + Drive Doc, pushes dashboard to GitHub Pages. Intended for non-interactive invocation (Windows Task Scheduler / cron).

skills.name: daily-briefing-followup
skills.description: Interactive Q&A about today's briefing. Reads the artifacts produced by the autonomous run, walks through each actionable item, asks James whether to draft replies / promote to tasks / mark done / dismiss. Intended for manual invocation after the autonomous run completes.

execution_model.rationale: The agent's reasoning replaces the ~14 anthropic.Anthropic().messages.create() calls in daily_briefing.py. Net effect: synthesis cost moves from API balance to subscription.
